title: God's Part.
content:
Prayers and praises are those spotless two
    Lambs, by the law, which God requires as due.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Robert Herrick, titled "God's Part.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
